you should play it without slowdown and change the title to "playing pit of despair without slowdown to prove it's not pit"
oh yeah HF, do you know about using a powerup or taking damage to drop a shell while maintaining the velocity it last had when you grabbed it? i wouldn't be surprised if it was already known lol

hey, i was the one who changed the category. i sincerely apologize for not consulting you or dacin about the change. that's absolutely on me and you all are correct to be upset about it. it was pretty irresponsible of me to not do that. i don't have an excuse, it was just a bad idea overall that stemmed from the difficulty and category revamps and the discussions around it. i am extremely sorry, genuinely, and in hindsight i'm not sure why i decided to do that.
iirc part of the reasoning was she saw your comment saying you didn't think it was pit
are there any legacy difficulties? i feel like that's kinda important when switching to a new system
yeah, i should have asked. and i've been listening and i do agree with all of your points. i just didn't really consider any of that.
but it won't happen again, promise.
i should've said like a legacy tag, as in the difficulty may not reflect what people associate it with nowadays
there will always be edge cases in either direction
i think most people still perceive pit as being difficulty based
i at least still did
difficulty is also relative to how it is intended to be played
the way i always heard it phrased is that it requires more than just savestates
i've always perceived pit as needing extensive knowledge of how SMW works and its tools :S
like even back in early 2010s
intricate knowledge check
i don't as long as it isn't SMM pit Kappa

but yeah, in the demo level so far i'd also say it's not that different from something like kruela
in terms of tools anyway

load a value, AND with #$20, ASL 3 times, then ROL, then AND with #$01 for some reason
no idea why the second AND is there when it wouldn't affect anything
that doesn’t affect anything surely
if that's the goal though the AND #$20 could be skipped
and zero flag doesn't matter because the next two instructions are STA and then LDY #$00
oh do they not? i thought LDY #$00 would
https://floating.muncher.se/cgi-bin/alcarobot?cmd=eval+LDA+%23%2401+LDA+%23%2400 claims otherwise
i'd have been very surprised if that did not affect the zero flag
but yeah it was one of those cases where i was like "i feel like this is redundant but im too scared to touch it"
load bearing AND
